description_long: This vase features a robust, slightly tapered cylindrical form with a wide, rounded rim and a deep, open cavity. Its surface is textured with a highly realistic wood grain pattern, displaying prominent cracks, splits, and weathered lines that evoke the look of aged, natural timber. The coloration is predominantly a mix of pale grays and light browns, with subtle variations and darker streaks that enhance the impression of organic material. The rim is gently undulating, adding to the handcrafted, rustic aesthetic. The interior appears hollow and follows the same wood-like texture as the exterior, suggesting it is carved from a single piece. This vase would be a striking decorative element in urban parks, plazas, or modern outdoor spaces.
description: A rustic, wood-textured vase with a wide, rounded rim and deep cavity, featuring prominent cracks and weathered grain patterns. Its pale gray and brown coloration gives it a natural, aged timber appearance.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the wide, undulating rim and deep cavity, with prominent vertical cracks and a lighter wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: This side view shows a large, dark split running diagonally, emphasizing the weathered texture and deeper grain lines.
description_view_2: Here, the vase displays a pronounced curved crack and more subtle color variations, with the wood grain appearing slightly lighter.
description_view_3: This view reveals a dense network of fine cracks and a more uniform grayish tone, with less pronounced splits than other sides.
